prompt: How do I make a hex sticker for my R-Ladies chapter? I have Affinity Studio installed.
assertions: Says to start from the official Affinity hex template
Says to edit the Content layer with the chapter name / elements
Says to recolour using the brand hex codes / brand colours
Mentions batch-selecting strokes via Layer > Select > Same > Stroke Colour
States a logo-integrity rule (don't move/rotate/distort the R relative to the text)
Mentions the Canva R+ template as an alternative
